resources.string: This wallet is not backed up. Make sure you have your recovery words saved before deleting.
This wallet will be deleted from this device. You can recover it from the Cloud Backup screen, or permanently delete it from there.
This wallet is not backed up and contains funds. You will lose access to these funds forever.
For security purposes, enter your TAPSIGNER PIN before importing your wallet.
For security purposes, enter your TAPSIGNER PIN before backing up your wallet.
For security purposes, enter your TAPSIGNER PIN before signing a transaction.
Cloud Backup verification failed. Try again.
Cloud Backup needs to repair its manifest.
Cloud Backup needs to be set up again.
This Cloud Backup uses a newer format. Update Cove before continuing.
Cove will rebuild the cloud backup manifest from the wallets on this device.
Existing cloud backup data cannot be trusted. Set up Cloud Backup again to continue.
Cloud Backup failed. Please try again.
You\'re offline, so Cove can\'t check for a cloud backup right now. You can continue onboarding now and check Cloud Backup later in Settings.
Cove couldn\'t confirm whether a cloud backup is available because cloud storage may be unavailable. You can still try restoring with your passkey if you\'re reinstalling this device.
Cove couldn\'t confirm whether a cloud backup is available. You can still try restoring with your passkey if you\'re reinstalling this device.
Please enter a valid amount to send.
Enter an amount greater than zero.
You do not have any bitcoin in this wallet. Add bitcoin before sending a transaction.
The address %1$s is for %2$s, but your wallet is on %3$s.
You do not have enough bitcoin to cover the amount plus fees.
Send amount is too low. Please send at least 5000 sats.
Check your internet connection and try again.
Unable to complete the wallet operation. Please try again.
Selected coins include locked coins. Unlock them or choose different coins.
Unable to get fee details. Please try again.
Unable to build the transaction. Please try again.
Unable to calculate the maximum send amount. Please try again.
Unable to save the unsigned transaction. Please try again.
Cannot create a transaction without fee information. Check your internet connection and try again.
The fee is higher than the amount you are sending.
The fee is higher than 20% of the amount you are sending.
Cove could not read the lock state for this wallet. Locked coins are excluded for safety. Please try again shortly.
Cove is still checking which coins are unlocked. Please try again shortly.
The words do not create a valid wallet. Please check the words and try again.
This wallet has already been imported. Taking you there now...

This wallet\'s private key is no longer available on this device. It has been converted to watch-only. To restore full access, recover it from Cloud Backup or import your seed words.\n\nThis can happen when restoring from a backup to a new phone. For security reasons, private keys are not included in regular Android device backups.
You will not be able to send bitcoin with this wallet. You will only be able to create receive addresses and view transactions.
Unable to import this wallet. Please check the file or words and try again.
Unable to select wallet. Please try again.
Unable to import this hardware wallet. Please try again.
This file is not in a format Cove can import.
This data is not in a format Cove can import.
The address %1$s is for %2$s, but your wallet is on %3$s.
Please select a wallet to send to this address.
Please allow camera access in Settings to use this feature.
Unable to read this QR code. Please try scanning it again.
No unsigned transaction found for transaction %1$s.
Unable to get an address for this wallet. Please try again.
This wallet can only watch transactions. To send, import the seed words for this wallet or import the public key from your hardware wallet.
Choose how to import your hardware wallet.
Choose how to import your seed words.
This TAPSIGNER has not been set up yet. Would you like to set it up now?
Unable to set up this TAPSIGNER. Please try again.
Unable to import this TAPSIGNER. Please try again.
The PIN you entered was incorrect. Please try again.
Would you like to go to this wallet?
Would you like to start using this TAPSIGNER with Cove?
You need to back up this wallet before changing the PIN. Would you like to take a backup now?
The wallet database is corrupted and cannot be opened. You can delete this wallet and re-import it to fix the issue.
